---
title: "Services | Divyas Mystic Sanctuary"
description: "Tarot card readings, Reiki healing and crystal ball guidance."
---

<section class="page-hero reveal"><p class="eyebrow">Services</p><h1>Every session begins<br><em>with your question.</em></h1><p class="page-hero__lead">Choose the offering that feels right. Sessions may be arranged online or in person—please confirm availability when booking.</p></section>
<section id="tarot" class="service-detail reveal-on-scroll"><div class="service-detail__visual"><span>✧</span><small>01 / Tarot</small></div><div><p class="section__overline">Tarot Card Reading</p><h2>Find perspective in<br><em>the present moment.</em></h2><p>Tarot is a reflective conversation with symbols. Together, we explore the themes around your question and the possibilities available to you.</p><ul><li>Relationships and family</li><li>Career and next steps</li><li>Decision-making and personal growth</li></ul><a class="button button--gold" href="contact.html#book">Book a Tarot reading <span>↗</span></a></div></section>
<section id="reiki" class="service-detail service-detail--reverse reveal-on-scroll"><div class="service-detail__visual"><span>☼</span><small>02 / Reiki</small></div><div><p class="section__overline">Reiki Healing</p><h2>Return to a sense<br><em>of ease and balance.</em></h2><p>Reiki is a gentle complementary energy practice. It is offered as time to slow down, settle the nervous system and reconnect with yourself.</p><ul><li>Rest and relaxation</li><li>Emotional balance</li><li>Quiet support during demanding seasons</li></ul><p class="disclaimer">Reiki is not a substitute for medical diagnosis or treatment. Please consult a qualified healthcare professional for health concerns.</p><a class="button button--gold" href="contact.html#book">Book a Reiki session <span>↗</span></a></div></section>
<section id="crystal" class="service-detail reveal-on-scroll"><div class="service-detail__visual"><span>◉</span><small>03 / Crystal ball</small></div><div><p class="section__overline">Crystal Ball Guidance</p><h2>Make room for<br><em>fresh possibility.</em></h2><p>Crystal ball guidance is an intuitive practice for reflection and exploration. It can help you frame a question and notice what you already know beneath the noise.</p><ul><li>Life direction and transitions</li><li>Relationships and choices</li><li>Spiritual reflection</li></ul><a class="button button--gold" href="contact.html#book">Book a crystal session <span>↗</span></a></div></section>
